description: Maps Annex 11 clauses to the audit events that evidence them in a MakerChecker bundle. A control-to-clause crosswalk, not a certification.

clauses.title: Validation
clauses.requirement: The system supports evidence that records are accurate and alterations are detectable.
clauses.note: Partial: tamper-evidence is provided; lifecycle validation (URS/FS/IQ/OQ/PQ) is the operator's process — see the GxP validation kit.

clauses.title: Audit Trails
clauses.requirement: Build into the system the creation of a record of all GMP-relevant changes and actions.
clauses.note: Every agent action and governance decision is recorded in the hash-chained log.

clauses.title: Security — access restricted to authorised persons
clauses.requirement: Only authorised roles may act; unauthorised actions are refused.

clauses.title: Management of who can enter and change data; segregation of duties
clauses.requirement: The person who prepares an action and the person who authorises it are separated.
clauses.note: Segregation is enforced at runtime; a conflicting actor records enforcement.sod_violation, and gated actions are decided by a separate identity.

clauses.title: Electronic Signature — permanently linked, with time and date
clauses.requirement: Electronic signatures are permanently linked to their record and carry date/time.

clauses.title: Risk Management — controls proportional to risk; high-risk actions gated
clauses.requirement: Higher-risk actions carry stronger controls (a required approval gate).
